servers._comment_capabilities: TCLAW-0C: classifyCapability() has NO name-based read path — a tool is only 'read' via this map (P1) or a trustworthy MCP readOnlyHint (P3). Everything else fails closed to write-class and requires approval on LOCAL_EDGE, even honest read-only tools like quote_get. Annotate each real read tool below (keyed by the server's own un-namespaced tool name) to remedy the over-gating. Write tools like chart_set_symbol are deliberately left UNANNOTATED so they fail closed to write, which is correct. NOTE: this map may document read tools beyond the active `tools` allowlist above (e.g. chart_get_state, symbol_search) — that's intentional, describing the server's broader read surface for when the allowlist is expanded; the extra keys are inert until the tool is actually enabled.
